summary: Iter10 - All 3 new features verified end-to-end: (1) Sospesi sync between /api/titoli/sospesi total and /api/contabilita/brogliaccio?data=TODAY (riepilogo_kpi.crediti AND liquidita.sospesi_attivi both equal sum(titoli.importo_lordo)). (2) Incasso flow with tipo_chiusura='sconto' on partial payment (300 paid / 1124.70 lordo, 280 paid / 300 lordo) correctly creates entrata incasso_premio + uscita sconto_cliente movements for the residuo; response.sconto_applicato == residuo, titolo_residuo_id is null. (3) Incasso flow with tipo_chiusura='sospeso' on partial payment (1000/1124.70) correctly creates ONLY the entrata movement and a NEW Titolo (tipo=regolazione, stato=da_incassare, titolo_coperto inherited, numero_titolo suffix '-RES') with importo_lordo=residuo (124.70); response.titolo_residuo_id is set and new titolo appears in /api/titoli/sospesi. (4) Invalid tipo_chiusura returns 400. (5) Avvisi di Scadenza: preview endpoint returns {giorni, polizze, titoli, n_polizze, n_titoli}; esegui returns {ok:false, errore:'SMTP non configurato...'} as expected (SMTP intentionally not configured) and a log entry is persisted; /log endpoint returns list sorted most-recent-first. Frontend verified: /sospesi page renders sospesi-riepilogo-collab table with collaborator/count/total and TOTAL row (349,40 € matching the main table). /titoli page header 'Premio €' present (col 5); each non-incassato row exposes data-testid='titolo-incassa-{id}' (50 found). Dialog-incasso opens correctly showing dlg-premio (480,00 €), inc-importo-pagato input; partial payment shows residuo-section with opt-sconto + opt-sospeso radios; Conferma incasso with 'sospeso' option succeeds with success toast 'Incassato 460,00 € — residuo 20,00 € lasciato a sospeso'. 7/7 pytest PASS.
critical_code_review_comments: incassa_titolo endpoint (server.py:2363-2518) does not validate importo_pagato < 0 or importo_pagato > lordo. Currently if importo_pagato is negative the residuo is computed as max(0, lordo - negative) = lordo + |negative| which is rejected silently (sconto_applicato becomes large positive). Suggest adding 'if importo_pagato < 0 or importo_pagato > lordo * 1.0001: raise HTTPException(400, ...)'. Overpayment scenario is not handled at all.

The new residuo Titolo (line 2466-2482) sets data_copertura=data_incasso when titolo_coperto=True; this RESETS the copertura start date for the residual portion. If business intent is 'still anticipated since the original date', consider preserving titolo.data_copertura instead. Confirm with product owner.

_total_sospesi_as_of (server.py:2080-2104) considers stato=incassato AND data_incasso>X as 'still sospeso at X' to support time-travel KPI; however it does NOT consider the new residuo titolo's own data_copertura - if data_copertura > data_giorno the original was counted but residuo wouldn't be (correct). For TODAY this is consistent. Just noting the semantics.

Frontend DialogIncasso opt-sospeso radio uses RadioGroupItem with htmlFor labels - the data-testid='opt-sospeso' is on the RadioGroupItem element (not its hidden input). Click on label data-testid='opt-sospeso-label' works correctly; tests should target the label.

TitoliSospesi 'Riepilogo per collaboratore' uses '— senza collaboratore —' as a synthetic id (row data-testid='riep-collab-—%20senza%20collaboratore%20—'). The TOTAL row is rendered correctly outside the loop. No data-testid was added to the TOTAL row specifically - consider adding data-testid='riep-collab-totale' for easier targeting.

Avvisi di Scadenza /esegui currently writes log only on success; verify (out of scope this iter) that failures also call collection.notifiche_scadenze.insert_one so the log returned by /log shows the SMTP error attempt. Manual check: log returned correctly contains the failed attempt entries with 'errore' field.
seed_data_creation: Created 3 TEST_iter10_* polizze + titoli (importo_lordo=300/1124.70/100 and corresponding residuals). Also incassed 1 existing prod titolo (Verdi Luca 480→460+20 sospeso) - that residuo is correctly NOT in /sospesi because original was not titolo_coperto. TEST_iter10 residual titoli remain in DB (124.70 + 124.70 + 100 = 349.40 € total in /sospesi) - main agent should clean these up if running additional iterations.
context_for_next_testing_agent: test_iter10_sospesi_sync.py is reusable for regression. It validates: (a) brogliaccio.crediti & liquidita.sospesi_attivi == sum(titoli.importo_lordo) sync, (b) both sconto/sospeso incasso flows with new movements/titoli creation, (c) 400 validation, (d) avvisi-scadenze preview/esegui/log endpoints (handles SMTP-missing state gracefully). Tests assume admin user and that at least one compagnia + one anagrafica exist (auto-seeded by backend). The test creates polizze with prefix 'TEST_iter10_<timestamp>' for traceability. If you want stricter cleanup, add a teardown fixture that deletes by numero_polizza prefix. Field validation gotcha: Polizza requires 'effetto' (not just 'decorrenza'); Titolo.tipo must be one of 'nuova','rinnovo','appendice','regolazione','storno' (NOT 'quietanza').
rca of the issue: N/A - no bugs found. Implementation matches spec. All KPI/Liquidita sospesi values now sync with /titoli/sospesi via _total_sospesi_as_of helper that is called both in riepilogo_kpi.crediti override (line 2968) and liquidita.sospesi_attivi (line 2994). The incasso endpoint correctly branches on tipo_chiusura with mutual exclusion (sconto creates uscita; sospeso creates residuo Titolo). The Avvisi di Scadenza module is decoupled into /app/backend/avvisi_scadenze.py with cerca_scadenze/esegui_job_scadenze + APScheduler started at 08:00 daily on startup; manual /esegui correctly returns ok=false with SMTP error and logs the attempt.
